title: Compact mode savings projection + GitOps PR
description: User wants the compact-mode pitch with concrete numbers and a ready-to-merge PR for the lookup CSV. Canonical chain: discover_env (resolve receiver pod GH_REPO) → top_patterns (current ROI candidates) → advise_compact (gh PR for compact-lookup.csv). The compact-mode flow is gated on a snapshot, so the chain MUST start with discover_env. On a demo env where the receiver's GH_ENABLED=true is not wired, advise_compact returns 'receiver GitOps not configured' — the test accepts that as a coherent outcome (it's the correct truthful negative) AND verifies the chain at least walked discover_env → advise_compact.
prompt: Would compact mode save us money? Discover the cluster, then generate the gh PR command for compact-lookup.csv.

initial_tool.reason: Compact-mode advisor needs a snapshot to resolve the receiver pod's GH_REPO env var; discover_env is the entry point.

ground_truth.description: advise_compact result is one of: full plan with `gh pr` command, OR a coherent truthful-negative explaining what's missing
